name: @journeyforge/desktop
description: 브라우저 여정을 기록해 Playwright 테스트, API 흐름 문서, k6 초안을 생성하는 로컬 우선 데스크톱 앱

scripts.pretest:e2e: pnpm --filter @journeyforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core build && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs
scripts.pretest:smoke-real: pnpm --filter @journeyforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core build && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core exec playwright install chromium
scripts.pretest:smoke-execution-real: pnpm --filter @journeyforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core build && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core exec playwright install chromium
scripts.prepackage:mac:signed: pnpm --filter @journeyforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core build && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs && pnpm exec electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.prepackage:mac:unsigned: pnpm --filter @journeyforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core build && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs && pnpm exec electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.prepackage:mac:dir:unsigned: pnpm --filter @journeyforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @journeyforge/core build && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs && pnpm exec electron-builder install-app-deps
